chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) حَرَّمَ كُلَّ مُسْكِرٍ قَلِيلَهُ وَ كَثِيرَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – Rasool-Allahsaww prohibited every intoxicant, a little or a lot

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/269)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/269)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا تَرَى فِي قَدَحٍ مِنْ مُسْكِرٍ يُصَبُّ عَلَيْهِ الْمَاءُ حَتَّى تَذْهَبَ عَادِيَتُهُ وَ يَذْهَبَ سُكْرُهُ فَقَالَ لَا وَ اللَّهِ وَ لَا قَطْرَةٌ تَقْطُرُ مِنْهُ فِي حُبٍّ إِلَّا أُهَرِيقَ ذَلِكَ الْحُبُّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad and Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, altogether from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Abu Al Magra, from Umar Bin Hanzala who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What is your<sup>asws</sup> view regarding a cup of an intoxicant upon which the water is poured, its normality goes away, and its intoxication goes away’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and there is no drop which drops into a container except that container must be emptied’.
en.sarwar: 15. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad and Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad all from Ali ibn al-Hakam from abu al-Mighra’ from ‘Umar ibn Hanzalah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a cup of intoxicating liquor on which water is poured until its bad effect is gone and also its intoxicating effect. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, by Allah, even if one drop of it is dropped in a hub (a large water container) the whole hub must be thrown out.’”
